translation.literal_translation: Because there is no distinguishing specification, as in the case of the cup. (8)
translation.technical_translation: Sutra 1.4.8: the mantra does not uniquely fix Sankhya pradhana, since its descriptors are underdetermined, just as in the 'camasa' case where expression alone does not identify a specific referent.
translation.interpretive_note: Sutra-level rule: indeterminate imagery cannot ground exclusive doctrinal identification.

lexical_notes.contextual_sense: Tracks each block inside the section-level inferential sequence

uncertainty_notes: Technical gloss depends on preceding bhashya argument on underdetermination.
